parameters-en.Mode: Selects the type of filter effect (Low Pass, Band Pass, or High Pass).
parameters-en.Peak: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filter.
parameters-en.Gain: Adjusts the filter’s sensitivity to the incoming signal.
parameters-en.Drive: Selects whether the filter's cutoff frequency shifts Up or Down in response to the input signal.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
